purpose: C5 publication-plumbing freeze: default-deny allowlist-complement for Cut-2 runs (Structural Failure Coincidence, Sundog prereg Candidate 13)
baseline_semantics_rationale: Pre-run snapshots full-tree state (tracked + untracked + ignored, normalized paths, symlink-rejected). Post-run rejects any new path, removed path, or content-hash delta outside the allowlist. Tolerates a normal dirty workflow while catching pre-existing-file overwrites because the snapshot records content hashes, not just presence.
scope_re_curation_rule: The allowlist is never widened post-hoc to admit a write a run actually made. A tripped guard ⇒ append-only redesign, never a manifest amendment that retroactively legitimizes the violating write (A3 rule).
